refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-FR contributes to overall cycle time reduction.

selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system + Optimized travel path planning + Efficient dump mechanism

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination at the system level to avoid timing conflicts.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate site and duty cycle data for path planning
Risk of integration complexity between load and travel systems
High safety criticality requires robust fail-safe mechanisms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage timing dependencies between load, travel, and dump DPs.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration and coordination of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange real-time operational data for cycle time monitoring and optimization

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive operational commands and cycle targets from higher-level control

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Send safety alerts related to cycle operations

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Support communication between modules and remote operators

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes cycle time optimization logic and coordination, minimizing diffusion.
Contains physical actuation but less suited for cycle time coordination.
Focuses on remote control, not cycle time optimization.
Handles safety alerts but not cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization and coordination in NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple DPs
Risk of bottlenecks if coordination logic is not well modularized
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Modularize coordination logic within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and maintain clear interfaces.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the high-level cycle time requirement into manageable sub-FRs with corresponding DPs that logically address each sub-FR.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Potential for timing coordination issues across DPs
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Assignment to NGHE Solution module centralizes coordination, minimizing diffusion across modules.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements at the NGHE Solution module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface to manage timing dependencies
Modularize NGHE Solution to handle complexity
Plan verification scenarios for each sub-FR

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, the integration and coordination aspects require explicit representation to mitigate risks and improve clarity.

revise.why: To introduce an explicit coordination DP/interface managing timing and integration between load, travel, and dump operations.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available
Safety criticality demands robust fail-safe design
open_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Potential timing conflicts between cycle phases
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating cycle time improvements
